summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2P Exchange MVP - all core functionality working correctly

resolved_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in trader/merchant registration
resolved_issues.fix: Added proper database projection to exclude _id field

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
Trader dashboard with balance display and deposit functionality
Merchant registration with business type selection
Merchant pending status and chat functionality
Admin can view and approve pending merchants
Payment link creation after merchant approval
Trade creation with proper commission calculation
JWT authentication working across all user roles
